{Benefits=Insurance, defense R&D exposure, innovation work, and long term technical growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Karnataka, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Artificial Intelligence and Autonomy, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=21-08-2026, Expiry Date=11-07-2026, Job Description=Develop autonomous strike logic, mission behavior, and smart decision systems for UAV platforms., Job Posting Name=Autonomous Mission Control Drive 01, Job Requirements=Experience in autonomy logic, AI systems, mission workflows, and intelligent control., Job Title=Autonomous Mission Control Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=Yes, Required Education=M.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1900000, Salary From 2=2500001, Salary From 3=3300001, Salary To 1=2500000, Salary To 2=3300000, Salary To 3=4100000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have autonomy or intelligent control experience in UAV or robotics systems?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on mission logic, automated response, or autonomous behaviors?, Screening Question 3=Which AI or autonomy frameworks have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}
